MERIDIAN / styleguide
IndexColorTypeSpacingComponentsMotion ›
v0.1 · 2026
motion / styleguide

Earn every motion.

Eight primitives. Every page composes from these — never below. The hero you're looking at is one of them.

01

Magnetic

Cursor pulls children within a radius. Spring physics. Off on touch + reduced-motion.

↳ specradius=160 · strength=0.4 · spring(stiffness=320, damping=24)

02

Marquee

GPU-only infinite scroll. Pauses on hover. Pure CSS animation; reduced-motion freezes.

MERIDIAN·instruments not reports·cohort drift 0.02·ltv +218·model v3·signal/noise 0.94·MERIDIAN·instruments not reports·cohort drift 0.02·ltv +218·model v3·signal/noise 0.94·
↳ signal-01↳ signal-02↳ signal-03↳ signal-04↳ signal-05↳ signal-06↳ signal-07↳ signal-08↳ signal-09↳ signal-10↳ signal-01↳ signal-02↳ signal-03↳ signal-04↳ signal-05↳ signal-06↳ signal-07↳ signal-08↳ signal-09↳ signal-10

↳ specspeed=48s · reverse · pause-on-hover

03

Reveal

Scroll-driven reveal via native CSS animation-timeline: view(). Stagger by index. Pure compositor.

surface01
hairline02
grain03
glass04
flux-hover05
magnetic06

↳ specstagger=80ms · animation-timeline: view() · range entry 5% → cover 35%

04

Counter

ease-out-expo animated count, formatted with Intl.NumberFormat. Triggers on intersection.

active accounts
0
churn risk
0.0%
lifetime value
$0
cohort drift
0.00
05

Parallax

Three depth planes via perspective + translateZ. Layout is the same plane; depth adds atmosphere.

∞

Depth as silence.

↳ specperspective=1200 · planes [−300, −100, 0] · transform-style: preserve-3d

06

Shader Background

Fragment shader FBM, brand-palette mix, mouse-reactive offset. Reduces to radial gradient under prefers-reduced-motion.

↳ specR3F · powerPreference=low-power · DPR cap=1.5 · 5-octave FBM

07

Cursor

Single global custom cursor. data-cursor='zoom' / 'link' / 'default'. Hidden on touch + reduced-motion.

The custom cursor is mounted at the root of any page that uses it (Phase 2). On this styleguide route it is not mounted by default — see app/landing for live usage. The element below previews the link-mode dot:

hover target · link modehover target · zoom mode
← back to styleguideto the landing →
— meridian / 2026 / a stub for the real thingstyleguide · v0
